TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mali hya' ga cyux maki' tay 17 00 N, 4 00 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1,240,192 sq km (maki' tay 24ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,220,190 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 20,002 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 17,467,108. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 34.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 10.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 55.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bamako. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 22 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta, aring ryax 4 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: mali ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, * ** w na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βamako. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mqiruʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa iβraħim βouβaʦ~ʨar ke*ta, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Mali hya' ga cyux maki' tay 17 00 N, 4 00 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 1,240,192 sq km (maki' tay 24ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 1,220,190 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 20,002 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 17,467,108. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 34.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 10.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 55.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bamako. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 22 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta, aring ryax 4 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: mali ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, * ** w na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βamako. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mqiruʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa iβraħim βouβaʦ~ʨar ke*ta, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
